synopsis:
Aboard the Amaxine Space Station, Snoke urges Ben Solo to embrace the dark side and seek out the Knights of Ren, warning that they may not welcome a former Jedi, especially one named Ben Solo, and that the cost of failing to join them is death. When Ben says he could learn from the Knights, Snoke tells him to find them on his own, beginning where he first met them.

A flashback shows Ben as Luke Skywalker's apprentice, traveling with Lor San Tekka to a High Republic-era Jedi outpost on Elphrona. Inside, amid stored Jedi artifacts, the Knights of Ren ambush them. Luke defeats the seven Knights nearly single-handedly, crushing their weapons, until their leader Ren rigs his own lightsaber to explode. Ren unmasks, senses the dark side in Ben, and invites the young man to contact the Knights should he ever wish to explore it.

In the present, Ben finds Ren's discarded helmet in the outpost, dons it, and receives a transmission directing him to Varnak, where the Knights now wait. As he admires the mask, he is confronted by his fellow students Hennix, Tai, and Voe.
title: The Rise of Kylo Ren #2
